Interface AsyncApiOperation

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Operation, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20Operation, AsyncApi21Operation, AsyncApi22Operation, AsyncApi23Operation, AsyncApi24Operation, AsyncApi25Operation, AsyncApi26Operation, AsyncApi2xOperation, AsyncApi30Operation, AsyncApi31Operation, AsyncApi3xOperation
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi20OperationImpl, AsyncApi21OperationImpl, AsyncApi22OperationImpl, AsyncApi23OperationImpl, AsyncApi24OperationImpl, AsyncApi25OperationImpl, AsyncApi26OperationImpl, AsyncApi30OperationImpl, AsyncApi31OperationImpl
public interface AsyncApiOperation extends Operation
